chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.728 of 2026 [Muhammad Yameen v. The State] ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For hg of bail appln 08.04.2026. Mr. Noor Zaman Domki, advocate for applicant. Mr. Ali Haider Salim, Additional Prosecutor General. After arguing the bail application at some length, learned defence counsel does not press this bail application and seeks directions to the trial court to expedite the trial, which has not been opposed by learned APG. In view of above, this bail application is dismissed as not pressed. The trial court is, however, directed to expedite the trial, examine material witnesses and conclude it within three months without fail, after which in any case, the applicant would be at liberty to repeat his bail application, which will be decided on its own merits. The Cr. Bail Application stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
